entry.title: Add new columns in Manage Purchase Requisitions Professional (F2229) Fiori App
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am seeking advice on adding new columns in Purchase Requisition Items section in Manage Purchase Requisitions Professional (F2229) Fiori app. I thought it would be possible to use Data Source Extension in the Custom Fields and Logic app, but it seems it is not possible to use that with this app. If anyone that has done this requirement or has any suggestions that could fulfill this requirement, please share your thoughts. 

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: How to create your own ATC check in ABAP Development Tools for Eclipse
entry.content:
Hello @NitinG ,

 

Thanks for your reply. This I have already done.

But, how to get the object provider and the service ID for the specific object provider(corresponding agent) within the interface IF_CI_ATC_CHECK? We cannot call the class CL_ABAP_SOURCE_ID directly in SAP BTP ABAP to get all available source IDs.

 

Regards,

Harish

entry.title: Re: Creating OData Service with SAP BW Query for C4C Integration via Cloud Platform Integration (CPI
entry.content:
Thanks for sharing Ravikanth.
I have added a reference to this blog post in the central SAP BW/4HANA Cloud Integration blog.
Regards Frank

entry.title: Re: Users Cannot See Their Own Contingent Worker Profile...
entry.content:
Okay, thanks for further clarification. I understand it's not two parallel employments. but still the user has two profiles (one is for CW, one is for regular employee). For user with two profiles, whey they're checking their own profile, they cannot switch the employment via the radio button (that in your screenshot).Instead, they should use the Employment Switcher, namely the button above the people profile header. Please refer to KBA 2535809 - User is unable to toggle between their various concurrent employments as there is no radio button available - SAP for Me

Could you please proxy as the user and check if they can see the Employment Switcher button?

entry.title: Stay certified due
entry.content:
Hello

I have my current certification under a Universal ID with my personal email.

I have a valid subscription under my company's email which is linked to another Universal ID.

I need someone to help me add my company's email to my personal Universal ID. When I try to add it myself I get an error message saying that my company's email is associated to another Universal ID.

Please help as I only have a few days to stay certified, otherwise I will have to retake the full certification.

 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: How to create your own ATC check in ABAP Development Tools for Eclipse
entry.content:
Hello @harish_dahima ,

In the RUN method of your main ATC check class, you will be provided with data_provider as a parameter. Please use below method call to retrieve the system name in case of remote systems. It will blank if you are checking the same system:

System_id = data_provider->get_object_provider_name( ).

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Why the expiry date of SF "Certified Professional" in...
entry.content: Hi Marit - Thx a lot for your reply.

entry.title: Re: New Resource-Related Intercompany Billing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi @Gregory1 

You are right. Intercompany stock transfer is not covered under the scope- items 4AN, 16T and 4AU and there is no support for the scenario you mentioned as yet. 

I would recommend that if this requirement is critical for you, please raise a request via Customer Influence Portal

entry.title: Re: Why the expiry date of SF "Certified Professional" in...
entry.content: Hi @Margit_Wagner Marit, Thx for your reply. However, I did create a case (ID:5000125724) but the agent just says "SAP decided to go for a new program named Stay Certified with new Conditions on the validity of the certification; please ensure you have Learning Hub to stay certified on your certificate." which did not answer my question about the expiry date of SFSF "PROFESSIONAL" certificate, instead of "ASSOCIATE" certifiate. That's the reason why I would like to check if others also encounter the same issue in this Q&A forum.

entry.title: Re: Is Full Profile View of the Latest People Profile wil...
entry.content:
Please refer to this blog for more info: New People Profile Experience - SAP Community 

It's still opt-in for 1H 2025 release.

entry.title: Re: Valuation group
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you very much for your question!

Can you please check whether this helps?

Defining the Screen Layout | SAP Help Portal

Kind regards,

Henrike

entry.title: Re: MANDT field missing when testing with RSA3
entry.content:
Hello,

this field refers to the client number, as for different clients, the standard datasource is the same, so it's necessary to have this field in the datasource to identify from which client the data is extracting.

As for RSA3, it's just a test tool in dialogue mode, so the testing if for the dialog user to test on the client which the user is logging on.

Actually I'm wondering why you would need to have MANDT in RSA3? To test the extracting result for other clients in the source system? 

(haven't been in the BW world for many years, considering standard ERP datasource shall remain the same/similar, hope this piece of info could help.)

Thanks,

Vince

entry.title: Re: Technical RFC Integration On-Premise-EWM 9.5 to Cloud...
entry.content:
To add a few points: for communication across the internet, WebSocket-RFC is much better suited than the classic CPIC-based RFC. Therefore I would strongly recommend option 1 in Simon's answer. For this there are two possibilities:

  1. The SAP_BASIS release of your EWM 9.5 system is "new enough" (release 19/09 or newer).
    Then you can simply create a destination of type "W" in SM59, which points to your Cloud system.
    To answer your question about firewall: you don't need to open your firewall for this, but you need to have an HTTP Proxy that allows outbound HTTPS traffic (at least to the IP addresses of your Cloud account). In the type "W" destination, you can then specify this HTTP Proxy, which will then be used for the WebSocket connection to the Cloud system. The technical connection then looks like this:
    EWM  ---WebSocket-RFC---> HTTP Proxy ---> Cloud system

  2. The EWM 9.5 system is "too old" (older than 19/09).
    Here it is still possible to use WebSocket-RFC by adding an extra step in form of a SAP Business Connector, which can convert classic RFC protocol to WebSocket-RFC protocol:
    EWM ---CPIC-RFC--->  SAP Business Connector ---WebSocket-RFC---> HTTP Proxy ---> Cloud system

    This setup is described here: WebSocket RFC to Cloud Using SAP Business Connector | SAP Tutorials (short tutorial)
    and here: WebSocket RFC to Cloud Using SAP Business Connecto... - SAP Community (detailed description including extra security settings, necessary steps in all three components and some technical background)

entry.title: Re: How to create your own ATC check in ABAP Development Tools for Eclipse
entry.content:
Hello @NitinG ,

 

Thanks for the prompt reply. How do we then get the communication management (arrangement + scenario) details from the object provider?

Harish

entry.title: Re: Email address not displayed in the spotlight view of...
entry.content: Currently if you have permission: Email under Employee data category. the email is display as a button. Please refer to screenshot. When you click the button, you'll be directed to email app, and you can see the email address.

entry.title: 採購單上的自定義欄位如何在採購單核發的頁面上顯示?
entry.content:
各位專家好，

我們目前有在採購單上開多個自定義欄位，

 但在採購單核發的介面上，無法透過調整使用者介面的功能來添加這些自定義欄位

 

請教是否有專家知道如何設定才可於此頁面上添加欄位?謝謝!

entry.title: Request for Creating a Field in SF to Sum External Code IDs
entry.content:
We would like to create a field in Salesforce (SF) that sums the values of three external code ID fields. Two of these fields are within the Job Info section, and the third is the User ID. Is this possible to achieve through business rules or any other method?

The new field will be composed of the following external codes:

  • Location External Code
  • Company External Code
  • User ID

entry.title: Re: Query Regarding UTR Number Capture and Clearing Funct...
entry.content:
Hello,

Please investigate if algorithm 019 meets your requirements. With this algorithm you can automatically match the bank statement item with the outgoing payment (initiated by the payment program).

Best Regards,
Henk Hoogerbrug

entry.title: Integrating a S/4HANA Cloud Service Order service import artifact error
entry.content:
Hi there. 

I'm busy building a CAP extension for an SAP workshop. I'm following documentation and for a certain step it asks to add external resources. I add the Odata service which has been exposed to BTP using a destination. I add it to my project, external files are created etc. The next step in the documentation states to add a service entity. When I try to add it via story board, no UI opens up. Thus, I cannot continue the tutorial. After investigating I run into my newly generated services.cds file created under the external folder giving me the following error: 

I have scoured the web for help but to no avail. I follow the documentation to the T.  Any help? 

Thanks in advance.

Repeated Operation Confirmation | SAP Help Portal

How can we achieve this in SAP Digital Manufacturing?

entry.title: Re: Contract Details dont show in purchase order

entry.title: Delta Accrual Posting Zero Value
entry.content:
We have a condition contract where we have executed a delta accrual for the date 20.03.2025 and the accounting documents have been created correctly i.e. debit expense account and credit provision account.

We have executed delta accrual again for the date 21.03.2025 and an incorrect accounting document has been created which debit and credit the same account i.e. Expense account. The customer has no new billing document created for 21.03.2025. We have a background program running daily for delta accruals. 

The expectation is that the no delta accrual document would be created since there is no billing document for the same date.

Please assist, I am not sure if there is a configuration which I have and is incorrect.

entry.title: Can 'Display Changes to Objects' be used to view the scheduling agreement price change history？
entry.content:
We are looking for a new feature in 2052 to view the history of scheduling agreement price changes. 

Display Changes to Objects | SAP Help Portal

However, since there are no options available for the object, it is impossible to produce a result.

I hope to receive more detailed instructions on how to use this feature.

entry.title: Re: How to concatenate value in Global Variable
entry.content: I have added the content modifier as in the link you shared. But it does not work and when I traced, it seems that the variable "PartialInvoiceID" is reset after one splitter has finished processing. So, when next splitter comes, it becomes blank and there is no pervious value and it stores the new value. Could you please advise how should I use the variable not to be reset after each splitter? I have also tried by adding the Write Variable and Content Modifier before the splitter begins. But it doesn't work and have same error. Thanks a lot for your answer.

entry.title: Re: Top-Down Distribution Receiver Problem(CO-PA)
entry.content:
Dear expert,

based on screens provided, problem is probably due to missing Reference mapping provided for fields WBS Element and Segment in the Receiver Basis. You can use All to All mapping in reference mapping view, but reference mapping must be provided for fields of type "Retain and Relevant for Reference", if no value selected for the field. Please try to adjust and let me know, if it helped.

Best regards

Eugen

entry.title: SAP B1 Incoterms fields not passed from Purchase to Goods Receipt
entry.content:
In SAP Business One, when creating Goods Receipt PO related to a Purchase Order, using DIAPI or Service Layer, the fields related to Incoterms (Incoterm, Country, Region, etc) are not copied to the destination document. But the same process, when executed directly in SAP, copy this fields. 
  Is there any configuration that we can do, so the fields are copied?

entry.title: How to configure unauthenticated access to SAP CAP Service for specific UI5 apps?
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I'm currently facing an issue with authentication in my SAP CAP project. My tech stack includes Cloud Foundry, SAP CAP, HANA Cloud database, MTA, OData V4, and NodeJS.

We have around 15 apps deployed, and out of these, two UI5 apps need to access the same CAP service without requiring user login. Initially, I tried using a fixed user embedded within the UI, using JWT tokens to authorize calls to the service, but unfortunately, this didn't resolve the issue. Whenever I try to access the service, I'm redirected to the login page.

I've also attempted to use mocked authentication in the package.json, but the issue persists. Here's an excerpt from my package.json configuration:

 

{
   "cds":{
      "sql":{
         "native_hana_associations":false
      },
      "requires":{
         "[production]":{
            "db":"hana"
         },
         "app-service":{
            "impl":"@sap/low-code-event-handler"
         },
         "auth":{
            "restrict_all_services":false,
            "[development]":{
               "kind":"dummy"
            },
            "[production]":{
               "auth":{
                  "kind":"mocked",
                  "users":{
                     "alice":{
                        "password":"Test1234!",
                        "roles":[
                           "admin"
                        ]
                     }
                  }
               }
            }
         }
      }
   }
}

 

Despite the above configuration, accessing the service always redirects me to the login page.

Has anyone successfully implemented a similar scenario or have insights on how to correctly configure unauthenticated access for specific apps?

Thank you in advance for any advice!

entry.title: Guidelines on Variable Pay for Rating
entry.content:
Hello everyone.

I am trying to understand the guidelines for Variable Pay. Do they follow the same logic as Compensation? I want to exclude employees with a Performance Rating below 3, making only those with ratings of 3, 4, or 5 eligible for bonuses. This exclusion works correctly in the Compensation module, where we receive a hard warning in the merit field. How can we implement this exclusion in the Variable Pay module, specifically in the Amt field? 

thank you in advance, 

Olga

entry.title: Re: Bulgaria moving to EURO
entry.content: Ask your superadmin to provide you with a S-id to display Notes & KBA

entry.title: Re: SAP Public Cloud Automatic Payment Approval and Payme...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

To answer your first question, you can retrieve the payment voucher by using the « Manage Payment Media » app :

  1. Define the payment run identification reference
  2. Select the payment media you wish you retrieve
  3. Click on « Download »

Regarding your second question, there is indeed an alternative to establish a validation workflow that can be configured in the SSCUI 102336 configuration point in S4 Hana Cloud Public Edition requiring the prior implementation of the following scope items:

BFA: Bank Account Management

J77: Advanced Cash Operations

O77: Payment Management

OFA: Cash Flow Management

To access and configure SSCUI 102336, these scope items must be activated in your system.

Make sure that the required scope items are activated to use SSCUI 102336 in your SAP S/4HANA Cloud environment

Once you have checked all the previous requirements, here the steps you have to follow to set-up the solution :

  1. Access the « Manage Workflows » app: This application enables the creation and management of custom workflows.
  2. Create a new workflow: Select the option to create a new workflow and choose the document type « Payment. »
  3. Define the triggering conditions: Specify when the workflow should be activated, such as when the payment amount exceeds a certain threshold.
  4. Assign approvers: Define the users or roles responsible for approval at each stage of the workflow.
  5. Activate the workflow: Once configured, activate the workflow to make it operational.

For a detailed demonstration of configuring and executing a payment approval workflow in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, you can check out this video:

Workflow for Payment Approval - SAP S/4HANA Cloud

 

I hope this will answer your questions in details.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: Fiori elements: returning values when doing intent ba...
entry.content: Thank you, Jakes. I think that in combination with making use of the edit flow will be the solution for our requirement.

entry.title: Datasource 0G_CWWMB1_TXT in a S4/HANA system
entry.content:
Hello,

we have used the datasource 0G_CWWMB1_TXT in a release with product EHP8 FOR SAP ERP 6.0. This datasource is related to table T25A0.

Now we have a S4/HANA system (product version SAP S/4HANA 2023). The table T25A0 is still there, but we miss the datasource 0G_CWWMB1_TXT in the BI content.

Any idea?

Thank you very much in advance.

entry.title: Re: Recruiting Groups per legal entity
entry.content:
Hi @yakup

Please review KBA 2291548 - Working with Recruiting Groups in SuccessFactors Recruiting and point 7.2 of the Setting Up and Maintaining SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting guide to learn how to create and edit Recruiting Groups.

l’ll try to simplify the explanation and provide useful information:

1. The first step to create Recruiting Groups is granting access to the feature. You can do this by following these steps:

Admin Tools > Manage Permission Roles > select Role > Permission > Manage Recruiting > Manage Recruiting Groups

2. Once you granted the permissions,  you´ll be able to Create/edit recruiting groups. Recruiting groups are set up and updated by using the Admin Center > Manage Recruiting Groups

Follow these steps to create a new recruiting group:

  • Create a new group.
  • Choose Group Members (People Pool): Add by category or add individuals.
  • Choose Done.
  • Choose Update in the Group Membership box to get a count of the number of users matching the criteria specified.

Each group can include multiple people pools. See KBA 2473146 - People Pool Category in Manage Recruiting Groups - Recruiting Management if you would like to add one or more field categories on People Pool in Manage Recruiting Groups

3. To use recruiting groups, you must make changes to the XML file or you may use Manage Templates for Recruiting. See KBA 2644604 - Limiting the available users in the Operator field types (Recruiting Groups) via Manage Templates - Recruiting Management for more details.

I hope this information helps you.

Best regards

Alejandro

entry.title: How to add a field documentation in a custom analytical query
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am trying to add in some field documentation into a custom analytical query report but failing to find any documentation on how to do this. Please see image below which shows what happens when I right-click => More field help. 

This is powered by a custom CDS view and please see the reference below for the field and annotations.

The label annotation is working but the quick info is not at the moment.

 

@Aggregation.default: #SUM

@EndUserText.label: 'Not Invoiced Amount'

@EndUserText.quickInfo: 'Quick Info'

NetUnitPrice * (cast(RequestedQuantity as abap.int8) - cast((case when _ItemQtys.InvoicedQty is null then 0 else _ItemQtys.InvoicedQty end) as abap.int8)) as NotInvoicedAmount,

entry.title: Re: Dudas generales de como empezar a estudiar SAP
entry.content: Gracias Andres ABI por responderme. Entre en SAP BRANDENBURG y vi que solo es para estudiantes, yo soy trabajador.

entry.title: Re: SAP Developer Challenge March - SAP Community Escape House - AI 🤖🧠
entry.content:
Hi Nico / all

Managed to install all again (including node ) .  Now the generator runs, but strange error (see below ) with different parameter selection ( of the easy-ui5  3.8.1 generator ) 

? Which namespace do you want to use? com.myorg

? How do you want to name this project? myui5project

? How do you want to name the first uimodule within your project? myui5app

? Do you want to enable the SAP Fiori elements flexible programming model? Yes

? Do you want to use the awesomeness of TypeScript? No

? Do you want the module to be visible in the SAP Fiori tools? Yes

? On which platform would you like to host the application? SAP Build Work Zone,

standard edition

? What name should be displayed on the Fiori Launchpad tile? Test

? Where should your UI5 libs be served from? Local resources (SAPUI5)

? Would you like to create a new directory for the project? No

? Would you like to initialize a local git repository for the project? No

✨ creating new project com.myorg.myui5project

(node:3293) [DEP0180] DeprecationWarning: fs.Stats constructor is deprecated.

(Use `node --trace-deprecation ...` to show where the warning was created)
    force .yo-rc.json
 conflict package.json

? Overwrite package.json? overwrite

    force package.json

identical README.md

✨ creating new uimodule myui5app

✖️ An error occured while running ui5-project:uimodule#writing

Error easy-ui5 project project

Unexpected token '(', "(function "... is not valid JSON

mbpvonmokprom3p:easyui5test markushapke2$

entry.title: Re: Dudas generales de como empezar a estudiar SAP
entry.content: Gracias Christian Ace, me alegro que por lo menos los examenes esten en castellano. El Ingles lo comprendo un poco y sino siempre se puede traducir. Gracias

entry.title: Yard Logistics: Error while creating new business partner driver (number is not in number range)
entry.content:
Hello Community, 

next attempt, hopefully now in the right area...

I managed to customize Yard Logistics successfully (YO, YT etc.). Everything is working out well - except the creation of a new driver. So the self check-in is working until the system tries to create the driver id and driver. Than I get an error message, that the number is not in the number range. 

The driver in Yard Logistics is a business partner and has an own number range which is customized in 

"SPRO > Yard Logistics > Master Data > Setting Up the Yard > Define Number Ranges for Yard Request, Yard Order, Yard Task > Define Number Ranges for Driver Business Partner". 

Unfortunately it seems, that the system tries to use the "normal number range" which is defined in the "Cross-Application Components > SAP Business Partner". 

Can someone explain to me how the concept of Business Partners/ Business Partner Role and number range is functioning? How does the system know which business partner role uses which number range? I can't find the point where i can connect the business partner role to the number range which I defined in YL.

 

Configuration:

  • SAP Business Partner
    • Both connected via Standard Assignment BP  Role > BP Role Cat.
    • Number Range used? Don't know, can't find the connection, seems that number range "01" is used, but dont know why
    • Business Partner Role: ZYL_DR
    • Business Partner Role Category: ZYL_DR
  • Yard Logistics
    • Number range for business partner driver is defined
    • Default business partner for driver: ZYL_DR

If you need further information, please let me know. 

Many thanks, 

Sandra

entry.title: Re: Exciting Opportunity for SAP Partners: Join the SAP Customer Engagement Initiative - Cycle 1, 20
entry.content: @FabioPagoti Of course! Customers are free to join all projects on this list. Some projects would prefer to exclusively work with customers rather than partners. Therefore, I compiled the list of projects above that are open to partners as well.

entry.content:
Hello,

In our SuccessFactors production instance we have a certain internal user that has two candidate profiles linked. I want to remove one of both via "Manage duplicate candidates", but the system is blocking this with following message "Candidate merge failed because internal candidate profiles cannot be merged or replaced. " How can this security be bypassed?

 

Thanks in advance!

Kind regards

Solved: BP Duplicate checks messages as warnings - SAP Community

entry.title: Your Familiar SAP Menu, Now in Fiori! Unlock Easy Access to Your Favorite Transactions
entry.content:
👋 Remember how we talked about accessing your familiar SAP GUI transactions within the modern Fiori Launchpad? Well, here's a key piece of the puzzle: enabling the SAP Easy Access Menu in Fiori!

Think of the SAP Easy Access Menu (also known as the SAP Menu or User Menu) as the traditional way you navigated through SAP, with all those folders and transaction codes you might be used to.

The great news is that you can actually bring this familiar menu structure into your Fiori Launchpad! By doing a bit of behind-the-scenes configuration (like the trust relationships and activated services we discussed earlier), you can make your User Menu and the main SAP Menu appear right within Fiori's App Finder.

Why is this so helpful?

Easy Navigation: If you're used to navigating SAP using the traditional menus, this makes finding your way around in Fiori much simpler.
All Your Tools in One Place: You can access both the new Fiori apps and your familiar SAP GUI transactions from a single, unified interface.
Smooth Transition: For those transitioning to Fiori, having the familiar menu structure available can make the learning curve much less steep.
So, in addition to the shiny new Fiori apps, you can also have your trusty old SAP menus right at your fingertips within the Fiori Launchpad's App Finder! It's all about making your SAP experience as smooth and efficient as possible.

Have you enabled your SAP Easy Access Menu in Fiori? What are your thoughts on having both the old and the new in one place? Share your experiences in the comments below! 👇

entry.title: How to change the AccessoryType Icon on Grid table
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I would like to have the ability to display a table and then have the ability to delete rows using multi select or with an icon on each row. So far the best alternative I found is to use Grid table and AccessoryType button. This option works since there is an event on the accessorytType however the icon is predefined and I don't see a way to change that to be a deletion button .

Any ideas of how to achieve this or another way to achieve my goal with a table ? If the icon cannot be changed via config maybe it is possible to do this through CSS? Any guideline  please ?

I have also checked other options like:

- object table: This has a multi select that I could use as selection for deletion but I do not want to use that since that is not a real table with columns...

- DataTable control: There is an option for AccessoryType but it does only give disclosure indicator icon and also the event is onPress and not on AccessoryType like the Grid table has so not sure what is the point of having that and not the event?... I have seen others advising to simulate the icon with an image on the data table but because the event at cell/column level is not there then that will not give a really good experience since tapping on any column will trigger the deletion and redraw of the table is required...( correct me if I am wrong..)

Any help will be highly appreciated !

I've the requirement to add custom fields to the "Business Partner Contact" view. The custom fields are visible via "Adapt UI" in the "Manage Business Partner Master Data" (Business Context: Master Data Business Partner).

Anyone has an idea for me on how to achieve this requirement? I tried to search a business context related to Contact, but didnt find anything.

Thanks,

Alex

entry.title: IMMOBILIZATION WITH VAT IN SAP B1
entry.content:
Hello,

If I purchase a fixed asset on SAP and apply a 20% VAT,
the acquisition value of my fixed asset is the amount excluding tax (HT), not the amount including tax (amount after VAT), so the planned depreciation is excluding tax, but that's not what I need; I want to depreciate the amount including tax;
For that, I performed an asset revaluation on SAP and defined the amount including tax, but always the same planned depreciation.

Any idea?

Exemple: 

Fixed Asset IM005517
Excluding VAT: 22,000.00
Including VAT: 26,000.00
Planned Depreciation: 122.00
Desired Depreciation: 144.00

Regards.

entry.title: SAP info structure change synchronous updating
entry.content:
Hi together

I have the info structure S508 with synchronous updating and I want to change it to no updating.

If I click on Updating in MC25 then there is no entry for S508.

Can you please help me how I can change the synchronous update?

Thanks!

Markus

entry.title: Error in SAP Payment Medium Workbench while processing XML file
entry.content:
Business Requirement:

Question to payment process.

1. Current issue:
a. Vendor Payment method K-Split Payment
b. Documents posted(different FI document types)
i. Invoice
ii. Prepayment
iii. Credit Note
a. Expected result for xml payment format
iv. Invoice -> Split Payment
v. Prepayment\Credit Note –> Domestic Payment
a. Currently all payments are sent via Split Payment process, Prepayment and Credit Note are rejected by bank
2. Questions:
a. Is it any possibility to implement any automatic solution for this variant?
b. If not how process should looks from SAP perspective?
3. Additional remark:
a. Process in PKO works without issue.

Documents type which are not invoices(no VAT): KN, KR i KA

B (Domestic)--->ZPL_METAFORMAT

Prepayment and Credit Note need to check
K(split)---> ZPL_METAFOR_SP


bank name - PKO
1. Process in PKO works without issue.


NAGATIVE PROCESS
K (split)--->ZPL_BNP2_SPLIT_FORMAT
B(Domestic)---> ZPL_BNP2_DOM_FORMAT
BANK - BNP2

How to find program which is related to this method

entry.title: Re: Dudas generales de como empezar a estudiar SAP

Hi @carlos78 @Profe_AndresABI @ChristianAce 
To help us to understand your query and to ensure that everyone in the SAP Learning Group can follow we kindly ask you to communicate in English - Please reword your post accordingly.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Decoding SAP Fields: VBAK-BSTNK vs. VBKD-BSTKD 🕵️‍♀️
entry.content:
Think of SAP like a giant digital filing cabinet for a business. It has many folders (we call them "tables") to keep everything organized.

VBAK - The "Header" Folder 📂: Imagine the main folder for each Sales Order. `VBAK` is a table that holds the header data of a sales document. This is like the cover sheet of a file, containing key summary info for the entire order.
VBKD - The "Business Details" Folder 📁: Think of a sub-folder within the Sales Order file for business-related details. `VBKD` is a table storing the business data for a sales document. This holds more specific details about the business side of the order.

Now, let's decode the codes you asked about:

VBAK-BSTNK: This refers to the field called `BSTNK` inside the `VBAK` table. `BSTNK` stands for "Purchase Order Number" (from your Customer!). So, `VBAK-BSTNK` is essentially the Customer's Purchase Order Number recorded at the header level of the sales order.
VBKD-BSTKD: This refers to the field called `BSTKD` inside the `VBKD` table. Guess what? `BSTKD` also stands for "Purchase Order Number"! `VBKD-BSTKD` is also the Customer's Purchase Order Number, but recorded within the business data section of the sales order.

So, What's the Difference? 🤔

Essentially, both `VBAK-BSTNK` and `VBKD-BSTKD` are designed to capture the same thing: the customer's purchase order number.

Why are they in different places (tables)? SAP is structured to organize data efficiently. Having the PO number in both the header (`VBAK`) and business data (`VBKD`) tables can be useful for different purposes within the system, like reporting or specific business process logic. It's a bit like having a label on the main folder and also on a specific document inside - redundancy for easier access depending on what you're doing!

https://www.linkedin.com/posts/mickaelquesnot_decoding-sap-fields-vbak-bstnk-vs-vbkd-bstkd-activity-7305904682978234368-uAph?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop&rcm=ACoAAAJPDL8BjpJe3thZB6t04k7Z2hRVHhboAec

entry.content:

Thank You

entry.title: Re: SAP DATASPHERE: DYNAMIC FILTER TO START ON FIRST DAY...
entry.content:
Hi,

TO_DATE(YEAR(ADD_YEARS(CURRENT_DATE,2))||'0101','YYYYMMDD')

Like this?

BR

entry.title: Re: Make a component attribute optional in Child Componen...
entry.content: There is no way in Smartedit to make child component attribute inherited from parent optional. You would need to either edit parent component or create new structure.

entry.title: How to Transfer Physical Sample Information from 05 to 09 Inspection Type in SAP QM?
entry.content:
Hello SAP QM Experts,

We currently use inspection type 05 (goods receipt for production order) and inspection type 09 (recurring inspection). When we create a physical sample during the 05 inspection, we need certain details (e.g., storage location and test tube) to be transferred to subsequent inspections under inspection type 09.

Our main requirements are:

A new physical sample should be created for the 09 inspection, but it should inherit information from the 05 inspection.
The storage location and other relevant details (e.g., test tube) should be automatically available in the new inspection lot for 09.
Ideally, we would like this to be handled through standard SAP functionality without extensive custom development.
What would be the best way to achieve this? Is there a standard way to link physical samples across different inspection types, or would we need user exits or enhancements?

Thanks in advance for any guidance!

There will not be chance to have both WIP and Reserve.

Because either debit>credit, or credit > debit, not both.

entry.title: Deactivation of 2 sets of books
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Are you able to advise if would be possible to deactivate set of books. We can see how to do it in the system but cannot see any dates of when the deactivation will occur.

Other queries which need to be answered are:

- We assume all prior data will remain in place.
- What happens to any master data that has the different sets of books like in fixed assets that have valuation values per set of books
- Also Cost rate master data that has rates for each set of books.
- Also services master data that has rates for each set of books.
- Can we hide the non active sets of books?

Thanks

PERSON_NAME


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Deactivation of 2 sets of books
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

Thank you for your queries regarding the deactivation of sets of books. Please find below clarifications to each of your points.

 

  1. Go to Business configuration view
  2. Go to Overview
  3. Search and open activity Set of Books
  4. Select the Set of Books and click on Edit
  5. Go to Company Settings tab
  6. Click on Deactivate

 

Yes, it is technically possible to deactivate sets of books via the Business Configuration work center. However:

  • The system does not support setting a future deactivation date.
  • The deactivation is effective immediately once the change project is scoped and activated.

 

Will prior data remain accessible?

All historical postings and transactions related to the deactivated sets of books will remain intact in the database.

You can still access and report on historical data from those sets of books.
No postings will be possible in those sets of books once deactivated.

 

What happens to master data (e.g., Fixed Assets)?

Fixed Assets that have valuation views linked to different sets of books will be impacted:

Once a set of books is deactivated, the valuation view related to that set of books will become inactive.
The asset will retain the historical depreciation and valuation information for reporting, but you cannot maintain or post new values in that view.
Only valuation views tied to active sets of books will be available for future depreciation or revaluation.

 

Cost Rate Master Data


For cost rate master data (e.g., for cost centers or activities):

Rates defined per set of books will no longer be editable or used in cost allocations once that set of books is deactivated.
The system will ignore those entries during future calculations.
Historical usage of those rates remains part of reporting for those past periods.

 

Service Master Data with Rate per Set of Books


Similarly, for services master data where rates are maintained per set of books:

Rates linked to a now-deactivated set of books will be ignored in future transactions.
Only the rates under active sets of books will be considered by the system.
The historical service transactions using those rates will remain in reporting and audit trails.

 

Can we hide non-active sets of books?


Not explicitly. While you cannot "hide" deactivated sets of books in all UIs:

They will no longer appear in selection lists for new postings or configurations.
However, they may still be visible in historical reports or master data where they were used previously (e.g., valuation views in assets).
There is currently no front-end setting to suppress them entirely from view in all contexts.

 

Best regards,
Pooja Manjunath
SAP Product Support | SAP Business ByDesign

entry.title: Re: SAP IBP – Automatically Copy Values Within the Same K...
entry.content:
Hi @KacperBenner,

your requirement can be solved by implementing a custom DP BOM capability. So in essence you create a relationship between product A and B via a BOM with ratio 1. Unfortunately the related documentation of this custom solution by SAP isn't avaible anymore. SAP removed it quite a while ago.
https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2586250

But anyways, the implementation of such kind of a solution looks like breaking a fly on a wheel.

BR, Peter

entry.title: SAP Build Apps web preview stopped working suddenly
entry.content:
Hello SAP Comunitty,

I have been using SAP Build Apps for a couple of months now. But now I cannot open one of the projects I work on in the web preview. Last time I worked on it (2 days ago) it still worked. Now when I try to open it the preview dashboard just loads indefinitely. When I try to open it there is no activity in the developer console. Changing browser doesn't help.

Other projects open without a problem. Using an Old version of the Project where the Issue didnt exist yet didn't helped. 

I also tried opening the preview with a link from my browser history (which worked before) now only results in a white empty page.

SAP Build Apps
